situational_context: Running comeback week 7: 9 runs completed since gap-break (May 3). Distance progressed to 5.8 km but ACWR spiked to 1.36 on Jun 10 (above 1.3 cap) — now in consolidation phase. Three rest days (Jun 11-13) are allowing ACWR self-correction. HRV mostly LOW/UNBALANCED past week but statistically within normal range (7d avg 35 vs 90d baseline 36 +/- 3). RHR improved to 49.4 (below 90d baseline of 51). VO2max running jumped to 40.4 (from 38.3 at last state, +2.1). Weight continues downtrend: 102.62 kg (from 104.10). Primary modality remains e-bike commuting on sur-site days. Heatwave building mid-next-week (32-37C). Young baby (Leonie, 5 months) — missed sessions expected. Comeback protocol active: consolidate at 4.5 km before progressing distance. No new labs since Dec 2025. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: Consolidate running distance at 4.5 km for Run #10 and #11. Do not progress distance until ACWR drops below 1.2 with stable chronic base. Run #9 suffer score (34) and max HR (173) signal that the 5.8 km distance at current fitness is pushing too hard.
recommendations.measurable: Run #10 and #11 completed at 4.5 km with avg HR <=135 and suffer <=20

recommendations.text: Increase protein intake to meet 150g/day target. Current 7-day average is 128g (85% adherence). At 103 kg body weight during a comeback with concurrent mild deficit, protein is critical for tendon remodeling and muscle preservation. Target 1.4-1.6 g/kg/day.

Manage heat exposure for mid-week training. With 32-37C forecast, shift outdoor sessions to earliest feasible slot (11:30), carry water, use shaded routes (Vincennes sous-bois). Cancel if temperature exceeds 35C at training time. Dehydration compounds tendon injury risk.
recommendations.measurable: No heat-related HR drift >15 bpm above target in sessions this week

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR remains above 1.3 for 5+ consecutive days after resuming training
markers_to_watch.reason: ACWR spiked to 1.36 on Jun 10. Consolidation phase must bring it below 1.2 before progressing distance.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if Run #10 or #11 suffer score exceeds 25
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #9 suffer of 34 was excessive for Z2 consolidation. Heat will compound this. Target <=20.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Target gradual increase toward 25-30 over next 4 weeks
markers_to_watch.reason: Chronic load declined from 22.3 to 17.41 in 30 days. Needs to stabilize and build. Currently at 1.08% of historical peak.
Protein at 128g/day (85% of 150g target) is insufficient for tendon remodeling during running comeback at 103 kg.
